mapper.select: SELECT DETAIL_ID, ORDER_ID, PRODUCT_ID, MEMBER_NO, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_PHOTO1, PRODUCT_PRICE, COMPANY_NAME, PET_TYPE, AGE_GROUP, CATEGORY_NAME FROM ( SELECT OD.DETAIL_ID, OD.ORDER_ID, OD.PRODUCT_ID, O.MEMBER_NO, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, P.PRODUCT_PRICE, P.COMPANY_CODE AS COMPANY_NAME, P.PET_TYPE, P.AGE_GROUP, PC.CATEGORY_NAME FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN ORDERS O ON O.ORDER_ID = OD.ORDER_ID JOIN PRODUCT P ON P.PRODUCT_ID = OD.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_CATEGORY PC ON PC.CATEGORY_ID = P.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN REVIEW R ON R.DETAIL_ID = OD.DETAIL_ID AND NVL(R.REVIEW_ACTIVE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' WHERE O.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND OD.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND R.REVIEW_ID IS NULL ORDER BY OD.DETAIL_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT OD.DETAIL_ID, OD.ORDER_ID, OD.PRODUCT_ID, O.MEMBER_NO, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, P.PRODUCT_PRICE, P.COMPANY_CODE AS COMPANY_NAME, P.PET_TYPE, P.AGE_GROUP, PC.CATEGORY_NAME FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN ORDERS O ON O.ORDER_ID = OD.ORDER_ID JOIN PRODUCT P ON P.PRODUCT_ID = OD.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_CATEGORY PC ON PC.CATEGORY_ID = P.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN REVIEW R ON R.DETAIL_ID = OD.DETAIL_ID AND NVL(R.REVIEW_ACTIVE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' WHERE O.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND OD.DETAIL_ID = #{detailId} AND R.REVIEW_ID IS NULL

SELECT R.REVIEW_ID, R.MEMBER_NO, R.DETAIL_ID, R.REVIEW_RATING, R.REVIEW_CONTENT, R.REVIEW_PHOTO, R.REVIEW_REG_DATE FROM REVIEW R JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON OD.DETAIL_ID = R.DETAIL_ID WHERE OD.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND NVL(R.REVIEW_ACTIVE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY R.REVIEW_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW ( REVIEW_ID, MEMBER_NO, DETAIL_ID, REVIEW_RATING, REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_PHOTO, REVIEW_REG_DATE, REVIEW_ACTIVE_YN ) VALUES ( SEQ_REVIEW.NEXTVAL, #{memberNo}, #{detailId}, #{reviewRating}, #{reviewContent}, #{reviewPhoto}, SYSDATE, 'Y' )
